text:
To Masadora! Part 1 (いざマサドラへ！①, Iza Masadora e! (Ichi)) is the 135 th chapter of the Hunter × Hunter manga, written and illustrated by Yoshihiro Togashi.

Synopsis

As Gon and Killua make their way toward Masadora, they remember the shopkeeper's words about the bandits along the route. Gon asks Killua what they should do about her, and the young girl from before is seen trailing behind them. Killua tells him to ignore her and that they can lose her when encountering the bandits. But even with the two running at a quick pace, the girl could keep up with them, saying to herself that their stamina isn't bad for kids. Several bandits suddenly confront the three of them, leaping toward them as if to attack but quickly falling to their knees and begging for help.

The men lead the three back to their village and explain that they're being afflicted with a disease endemic to the island. They say that it starts with a low fever that will eventually become fatal if not treated in a month. However, they add that each dose of the necessary medicine only lasts for a week, allowing the fever to return, and since the pills are expensive and they've run out of money, everyone has become ill and no one can work. They plead with him to save a young boy's life who will die in a few days, asking for any money the two can spare. Gon and Killua analyze the situation like the game that it is, hoping to get items or information in return. The girl offers to help, but Killua just tells her to stay quiet (forcing her to conceal her bloodlust again). Gon offers the 80,000 for the man's sick son, who begins to complain about being so cold that he will die during the night.

The two offer their overshirts, but get nothing in return for them or the money, which was the last they had. Killua remembers that there are monsters beyond the mountains and that they can convert them into cards to sell. As the two come out of the forest and reach an area filled with large stone pillars, they immediately encounter multiple giant Cyclops, dodging their attacks and trying to land their own. Gon's punch to one of their faces does no damage, and Killua tells him to aim for the eye, climbing his way up one and kicking it in its weak point.

The monster turns into its card and Killua quickly collects it, with him and Gon dispatching so many that some even revert back to unconscious monsters. Killua says that every monster will have a pattern and weakness, telling Gon that they just need to stay calm and find the answers during combat. Gon assures him that Ging wouldn't have made a game that was unreasonable. As the two continue confidently toward Masadora, they soon encounter an enormous lizard that begins chasing after them.
